---
title: "test!"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true

server: shiny 
---

<!-- 
Til meg selv: 
Kjør `quarto preview index.qmd` i datafortelling-mappen. 
Husk å aktivere venv! 
-->

```{python}
#| title: pingus
#| content: card-toolbar
#| variable: ["1", "2"]
```

```{python}
import polars as pl
import plotly.express as px
from data_setup import combine_data_sources
from shiny import render, reactive, ui

year = 2025
df_ = combine_data_sources()
df = df_.filter(pl.col("track_played_utc").dt.year() == year)
df.sort(pl.col("track_played_utc"), descending=False).head()
```
# {.sidebar}

```{python}
months = list(range(1, 13))
ui.input_select("month", "fart",  choices=months)
```

```{python}
@render.data_frame
def month_filter():
  data = df.filter(pl.col("track_played_utc").dt.month == input.month())
  return data

```
